# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 10000 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend_service
              domains: 
              - "*"
              routes:
              - match: 
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: backend_service_cluster
                  retries:
                    max_retries: 3
                    retry_on: 5xx, gateway-error, connect-failure, timeout
                    per_try_timeout: 2s
                  timeout: 10s
            request_headers_to_add:
            - header:
                key: "X-Request-Id"
                value: "%REQ(X-REQUEST-ID)%"
            response_headers_to_add:
            - header:
                key: "X-Proxy-Name"
                value: "Envoy"
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
  clusters:
  - name: backend_service_cluster
    ConnectTimeout: 0.5s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: backend-service, port_value: 80 }
